steps.title: Internet & Web Basics
steps.description: Understand how the internet works, HTTP protocols, DNS, and hosting basics.

steps.title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript Foundations
steps.description: Master the core trio of the web. Build semantic structures, style with modern CSS layout modules, and make it interactive with JS ES6+.

steps.title: React & Tailwind CSS
steps.description: Component-based architecture, state management (Hooks/Context), and utility-first styling.

steps.title: Advanced Ecosystem & Frameworks
steps.description: Next.js for SSR/SSG, state managers like Zustand/Redux, and testing (Jest/Cypress).

steps.title: Python & Basic Statistics
steps.description: Learn the foundations of Python programming mixed with core statistical concepts.

steps.title: Data Manipulation (Pandas & Numpy)
steps.description: Clean, transform, and analyze large datasets efficiently.

steps.title: Data Visualization & SQL
steps.description: Query databases with SQL and visualize insights with Matplotlib/Tableau.

steps.title: Design Fundamentals & Typography
steps.description: Color theory, layout principles, and selecting the right fonts.

steps.title: Wireframing & Prototyping in Figma
steps.description: Create low and high-fidelity prototypes to visualize user journeys.

steps.title: SEO & Content Strategy
steps.description: Understand how search engines rank content and plan effective campaigns.

steps.title: Data Analytics & KPIs
steps.description: Using Google Analytics to track user behavior and conversion events.
